evals.prompt: Test our staging signup and first-project flow like a brand-new freelancer. Do not send any invitations.
evals.expected_output: Defines missions and safety bounds, executes observable journeys, probes states, and reports reproducible friction without sending invitations.

evals.prompt: Users abandon checkout on mobile. Hunt for likely UX friction and give us evidence.
evals.expected_output: Tests narrow viewport and interruption/error cases, avoids claiming causality from one run, and ranks evidence-backed findings.
